title: First assistant district attorney; additional salary
doc_html:
§752. First assistant district attorney; additional salary

           A. The office of first assistant district attorney for the Thirty-First Judicial District is created.

           B. The first assistant district attorney shall receive as compensation for his services, in addition to the annual salary paid by the state, an annual salary of three thousand four hundred fifty dollars, payable monthly on his own warrant. This additional salary shall be paid by the parish of Jefferson Davis.

           Added by Acts 1952, No. 382, §§1 to 4. Amended by Acts 1968, No. 548, §1.
doc_text:
§752.  First assistant district attorney; additional salary
A.  The office of first assistant district attorney for the Thirty-First
Judicial District is created.
B.  The first assistant district attorney shall receive as compensation for
his services, in addition to the annual salary paid by the state, an annual salary
of three thousand four hundred fifty dollars, payable monthly on his own
warrant.  This additional salary shall be paid by the parish of Jefferson Davis.
Added by Acts 1952, No. 382, §§1 to 4.  Amended by Acts 1968, No.
548, §1.
